{{Quote|Lastly, we have a complaint from the Aar'aa regarding their order. Apparently, the MSE droids skittering underfoot are making them uncomfortably… hungry.|[[Rebaxan Columni/Legends|Rebaxan Columni]] executives, product-testing the [[MSE-6 series repair droid/Legends|MSE-6]]|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>}}
'''Aar'aa''' were a [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Aar]].

==Biology and appearance==
Aar'aa could change their skin color to match their surroundings. Tall and muscular, they had pebbly scales, claws, a thin dorsal ridge, and large faces with thick eyeridges which overhanged small, glowing [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. Being [[Ectothermy|cold-blooded]] creatures, they became sluggish in extremely cold temperatures. Their [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] were [[Color/Legends|reddish-orange]] in color.<ref name="The Paradise Snare" />

==Aar'aa in the galaxy==
Aar'aa were often associated with [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] syndicates. Several Aar'aa served as guards for the [[t'landa Til]] "religious retreat" on [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] run by the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]].<ref name="The Paradise Snare" /> [[Pohtarza]] was assassinated by an Aar'aa employed by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]].<ref name="Rebel Dawn">''[[Rebel Dawn]]''</ref>

Apparently, they considered the movements of [[MSE-6 series repair droid/Legends|mouse droids]] somewhat appetizing, as it strongly reminded them of prey behavior patterns.<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids" />
